name: AI Co-Scientist Analysis Core
description: Minimal analysis-mode behavior checks for dataset-oriented planning and clarification.

parts.text: Run an analysis on this dataset.
The assistant should ask for the dataset identity, modality, or repository details before proposing an analysis workflow.
Help me find a public fMRI dataset for depression and outline how you would quality-check and preprocess it.

The assistant should propose an analysis-oriented plan that includes dataset discovery, modality-aware QC and preprocessing steps, reproducible execution expectations, and an approval or next-step prompt rather than pretending the work is already done.
